## Scope

Describe the purpose and boundaries of this PR.

## Checklist

- [ ] The branch is not `main`.
- [ ] The change is small and focused.
- [ ] Commits use conventional commit messages.
- [ ] No secrets, real `.env` files, service role keys, tokens, or credentials are committed.
- [ ] Environment variables are documented when added or changed.
- [ ] Database migrations are included when schema changes are introduced.
- [ ] RLS was reviewed when Supabase tables or policies are touched.
- [ ] Tests/checks were executed and listed below.
- [ ] Screenshots or visual notes are included for UI changes.

## Checks Run

```text
# Example:
# pnpm lint
# pnpm typecheck
# pnpm build
```

## Screenshots / Visual Notes

Add screenshots or notes when the PR changes UI.

## Decisions And Trade-offs

Explain relevant decisions, constraints, and follow-up work.
